top_signals.title: Aspen Group Eyes New Investors to Address Debt as Earnings Slump
top_signals.summary: The Aspen Group, the owner of one of the largest dental care chains in the US, is exploring tapping outside investors to tackle the maturities of roughly $3 billion of loans due next year amid weaker earnings, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
